scenario: llm-wiki adapter placeNew(component, conceptId) → on-disk relative path, per emitted kind. Mirrors placement/all-types.json's byType shape. SPECIFICATION golden (llm-wiki adapter = Chunk 4).
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — llm-wiki adapter is built in CHUNK 4.
realWorldSource: src/wiki/wiki.ts — pages live at pages/<page>.md (nested allowed); raw sources at raw/<slug>.md (akm owns raw-slug generation); index.md is regenerated (not placed by authoring)
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. Component-root-relative POSIX paths. Pages place under pages/ keyed by their conceptId (which already includes the pages/ prefix); raw sources place under raw/<slug>.md.
index.md is REGENERATED by `akm index`, not placed via placeNew (spec §5-analogue / wiki.ts regeneration contract); schema.md/log.md are authored once and not re-placed. Recorded under edgeCases.

wiki-source.name: 2026-08-tls-rfc
wiki-source.note: immutable source; akm generates the raw slug.

reservedFilesAreNotPlacedByPlaceNew.note: schema.md is authored once; index.md is REGENERATED by `akm index` (never authored via placeNew); log.md is append-only. These are not placement targets for new concepts.
